The dark background with bokeh effects transitions to a solid, medium purple screen. The previous narrative text disappears completely. New, centered white text fades in, displaying the title "How To Make Gluten-Free Viennese Whirls" across three lines.

The white title text brightens against the solid purple background. Subsequently, the background transitions to reveal a white plate holding a swirled biscuit and a white mug with a heart logo in the upper right corner. The title text remains overlaid on top of this new scene.

The purple tint and title text disappear, revealing a clear shot of a white plate on a dark, speckled countertop. A golden, swirled biscuit sandwich filled with cream and red jam rests on the plate. Beside it, a white mug features a logo with bread slices and the text 'THE LOCAL BAKEHOUSE'.

The scene remains completely static, featuring the golden, swirled biscuit sandwich with cream and jam filling on a white plate. Beside it, the white mug with the bread logo sits on the dark, speckled countertop. The camera holds a steady position with no new elements introduced or movements observed in the frame.

The scene with the biscuit and mug remains, but a cross-dissolve effect starts. Faint, semi-transparent images of white and pink rectangular objects appear overlaid on the plate and counter, partially obscuring the original view as the video transitions to the next shot.

The cross-dissolve completes, revealing baking ingredients on a dark countertop. Visible items include a tub of Pure spread, a butter box, white and pink bags, a blue cornflour box, and a vanilla extract bottle. A handwritten note lies centrally. The previous scene with the biscuit and mug fades into transparency, replaced by the ingredient layout.

The camera zooms in closely on the handwritten pink note lying on the dark countertop. To the left, a box of unsalted English butter becomes prominent. The note lists specific measurements for ingredients including butter, margarine, icing sugar, gluten-free flour, cornflour, and vanilla extract.

The camera maintains a steady close-up on a pink handwritten note detailing ingredient measurements for butter, margarine, icing sugar, flour, cornflour, and vanilla. A box of unsalted English butter remains partially visible on the left edge against the dark, speckled countertop surface.

The view shifts left to focus closely on a yellow and white box of unsalted English butter labeled "by Sainsbury's." The pink handwritten ingredient list is pushed to the bottom right edge, partially out of frame, while the dark, speckled countertop remains the background surface.

summary.text:
[0-6] A bright starburst on purple fades to dark purple with drifting bokeh lights. Text reads: "FOR ALL THOSE WHO'VE BEEN FOLLOWING.... You'll know this is my 4th attempt at making gluten-free Viennese Whirls. The first two attempts tasted great (but looked awful). The third attempt looked great (but tasted awful). And then the 4th attempt conquered everything..."
[6-10] The background becomes solid purple. New centered text appears: "How To Make Gluten-Free Viennese Whirls." The background transitions to reveal a plate and mug while the title remains overlaid on the scene.
[10-14] The overlay clears showing a golden, swirled biscuit sandwich filled with cream and red jam on a white plate. Beside it, a white mug on a dark speckled countertop features a bread logo and the text "THE LOCAL BAKEHOUSE".

[14-16] A cross-dissolve effect starts over the biscuit and mug, overlaying semi-transparent white and pink rectangular objects. [16-18] The scene transitions to baking ingredients on a dark countertop: a Pure spread tub, butter box, white and pink bags, blue cornflour box, and vanilla extract bottle, with the previous scene fading out. [18-22] The camera zooms in on a pink handwritten note beside the butter box, listing: "60g unsalted butter, 60g margarine, 35g icing sugar, 112g slr glf flour, 30g cornflour, 1/4 tspn vanilla".

[26-32] The camera pans right across a dark countertop, revealing a white tub labeled "Pure" sunflower spread, a butter box, a white bag of "self raising white flour," a pink bag of "butter cream icing," and a blue box labeled "cornflour by Sainsbury's." [32-34] A close-up shows a bottle of "NIELSEN-MASSEY" "MADAGASCAR BOURBON VANILLA EXTRACT" next to the pink bag. [34-36] The view cuts to a wide shot of a woman in a green t-shirt standing behind the counter with the ingredients and a plated biscuit; white cabinets and a tiered cake are visible in the background.

[36-48] A woman wearing a green t-shirt with "BEARSLAND SINGLE BEAR" text stands behind a black countertop arranged with baking ingredients, a white mug, and a white plate holding a golden biscuit. Behind her, white kitchen cabinets and a tiered cake on a stand are visible near a bright window. She initially gestures with hands raised while speaking [36-38]. She then looks down, picks up the biscuit with both hands, and takes a bite [38-42]. While chewing, she holds the pastry over the plate, raises her right hand near her chin, and resumes gesturing with both hands in front of her chest while speaking [42-48]. The baking ingredients remain stationary on the right side of the counter.

[48-56] A woman wearing a green t-shirt with "BEARSLAND SINGLE BEAR" text stands behind a black countertop, actively gesturing with her hands while speaking. She initially moves her hands from near her face to her chest with palms facing inward, then raises her right hand toward her mouth while keeping her left hand lower. She subsequently lowers both hands to her waist before raising them back to chest level with open palms. Throughout the clip, a golden biscuit rests on a white plate directly in front of her, and an array of baking ingredients remains stationary on the right side of the counter, with a tiered cake visible on a stand in the background.

A woman in a green t-shirt stands behind a black countertop, raising her hands from waist to chest with palms up, then lowering them while looking down at a golden biscuit on a white plate. She gestures with hands in front of her torso, palms facing each other or inward, near the plate without touching it. White cabinets, a tiered cake, and baking ingredients are visible in the background. The scene transitions to a purple screen displaying ingredients: INGREDIENTS 60g unsalted butter 60g margarine 35g icing sugar 112g self-raising gluten-free flour 30g cornflour 1/4 teaspoon vanilla extract

[56-72] A woman in a green t-shirt stands behind a black countertop, gesturing with her hands near her waist and chest while looking down. Her palms face inward or each other as she moves them slightly. A golden biscuit rests on a white plate before her, and baking ingredients stay stationary on the right side of the counter. The kitchen background features white cabinets and a tiered cake. [72-74] The scene cuts to a solid purple screen displaying white text titled "METHOD". The list includes: "1. Cream butter, marge, vanilla & sugar together. 2. Add flours and mix in well. 3. Pipe 2 inch circles onto baking parchment. 4. Bake for 15 mins in a 190 Celsius oven. 5. Allow to cool. 6. Fill with jam & buttercream."
